'''ân-v-p-l''' ('''kanavpeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bebless|bebless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-p-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bebless|bebless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-v-p-l
|-
! Lemma
| kanavpeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinavpeloko|thinavpeloko]] || [[word:jinavpeloko|jinavpeloko]] || [[word:shinavpeloko|shinavpeloko]] || [[word:kinavpeloko|kinavpeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunavpeloko|thuthunavpeloko]] || [[word:jujunavpeloko|jujunavpeloko]] || [[word:shushunavpeloko|shushunavpeloko]] || [[word:kukunavpeloko|kukunavpeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunavpeloko|thunavpeloko]] || [[word:junavpeloko|junavpeloko]] || [[word:shunavpeloko|shunavpeloko]] || [[word:kunavpeloko|kunavpeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunavpeloko|thunavpeloko]] || [[word:junavpeloko|junavpeloko]] || [[word:shunavpeloko|shunavpeloko]] || [[word:kunavpeloko|kunavpeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenavpeloko|thenavpeloko]] || [[word:jenavpeloko|jenavpeloko]] || [[word:shenavpeloko|shenavpeloko]] || [[word:kenavpeloko|kenavpeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonavpeloko|thothonavpeloko]] || [[word:jojonavpeloko|jojonavpeloko]] || [[word:shoshonavpeloko|shoshonavpeloko]] || [[word:kokonavpeloko|kokonavpeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonavpeloko|thonavpeloko]] || [[word:jonavpeloko|jonavpeloko]] || [[word:shonavpeloko|shonavpeloko]] || [[word:konavpeloko|konavpeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonavpeloko|thonavpeloko]] || [[word:jonavpeloko|jonavpeloko]] || [[word:shonavpeloko|shonavpeloko]] || [[word:konavpeloko|konavpeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnavpeloko|thĂŠnavpeloko]] || [[word:jĂŠnavpeloko|jĂŠnavpeloko]] || [[word:shĂŠnavpeloko|shĂŠnavpeloko]] || [[word:kĂŠnavpeloko|kĂŠnavpeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanavpeloko|thathanavpeloko]] || [[word:jajanavpeloko|jajanavpeloko]] || [[word:shashanavpeloko|shashanavpeloko]] || [[word:kakanavpeloko|kakanavpeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanavpeloko|thanavpeloko]] || [[word:janavpeloko|janavpeloko]] || [[word:shanavpeloko|shanavpeloko]] || [[word:kanavpeloko|kanavpeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanavpeloko|thanavpeloko]] || [[word:janavpeloko|janavpeloko]] || [[word:shanavpeloko|shanavpeloko]] || [[word:kanavpeloko|kanavpeloko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
